action: Recover and encode the temporal divergence between the aggregate queue snapshot and later append-only team updates without overwriting either source.

progress.finding: ACTIVE_QUEUE is a historical base snapshot and does not include later R-005 and V-001 delta state.
progress.contradiction_resolution: Preserve both sources as time-indexed observations; do not call either false. Treat a fold over owner-authorized later deltas as proposed current-state reconstruction until a deterministic reconciler is tested.
progress.verification: Artifact and evidence are additive JSON files with exact blob SHAs and explicit review routes; source files were re-read before creation.

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract operational findings only; no private chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, or unreviewed uploads.
handoff: Implement a deterministic queue reconciler and adversarial tests for timestamp ties, owner violations, malformed deltas, duplicate IDs, and preservation of untouched team records.
